title: API Order By attribute list?
excerpt: What are the attributes/field in the column values that the specific column types are sorted by when using items query order_by? Like Board_Relation seems to be sorted according to the value of the DisplayValue field, …

posts.author: EricM (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday API docs

Other types

Account productThe AccountProduct type is a field on workspaces queries and contains metadata about the account product the queried workspace is in.Fields FieldDescriptionEnum valuesid IntThe unique identifier of the account product.kind...

What are the attributes/field in the column values that the specific column types are sorted by when using items query order_by? Like Board_Relation seems to be sorted according to the value of the DisplayValue field, but what about all the other types?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @EricM,

Which query are you using exactly?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: EricM (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday ,
I am referring to a query like this:

image723×272 5.86 KB

Here I am sorting a time tracking column. I believe it is sorted according to the duration attribute/field. I am interested in knowing what attribute/field the other “ColumnValue” types are sorted according to.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @EricM,

I spoke with the team in charge of our documentation and we will be adding this information to our docs soon

You will find the relevant value taken into account in each case there.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: EricM (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday ,
Thank you very much for getting back to me on this. I am happy to hear that this will be added to the documentation!
